mapper.select:
SELECT cr.room_id as roomId, cr.bid_id as bidId,
CONCAT(c.nickname, ' & ', b.company_name) as partnerName,
b.company_name as partnerName,
c.nickname as partnerName,
IFNULL( CASE WHEN m.message_type = 'IMAGE' THEN '(사진)' ELSE m.content END, '대화 내용이 없습니다.' ) as lastMessage, CASE WHEN m.send_at IS NULL THEN '' WHEN DATE(m.send_at) = CURDATE() THEN DATE_FORMAT(m.send_at, '%H:%i') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(m.send_at, '%m-%d') END as lastMessageTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm WHERE cm.room_id = cr.room_id AND cm.is_read = 0) as unreadCount, req.request_id as requestId, req.title as requestTitle, bd.price as bidPrice FROM chat_room cr JOIN business b ON cr.business_id = b.business_id JOIN customer c ON cr.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN bids bd ON cr.bid_id = bd.bid_id JOIN request req ON bd.request_id = req.request_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t1.room_id, t1.message_type, t1.content, t1.send_at FROM chat_message t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT room_id, MAX(message_id) as max_id FROM chat_message GROUP BY room_id ) t2 ON t1.message_id = t2.max_id ) m ON cr.room_id = m.room_id
1=1
AND cr.customer_id = #{myId}
AND cr.business_id = #{myId}
ORDER BY IFNULL(m.send_at, cr.created_at) DESC

SELECT message_id as messageId, room_id as roomId, sender_id as senderId, sender_type as senderType, message_type as messageType, content, is_read as isRead, send_at as sendAt FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY send_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (room_id, sender_id, sender_type, message_type, content, send_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{senderType}, #{messageType}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
AND sender_type != 'CUSTOMER'
AND sender_type != 'BUSINESS'
AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT room_id as roomId, bid_id as bidId, customer_id as customerId, business_id as businessId FROM chat_room WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
SELECT room_id FROM chat_room WHERE bid_id = #{bidId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room (bid_id, customer_id, business_id, created_at) VALUES (#{bidId}, #{customerId}, #{businessId}, NOW())
